descriere_fix: Adaugă rate limiting per consumer pubkey pe relay folosind sliding window counter in-memory, limitând la 60 req/min configurabil, și returnând 429 cu Retry-After header când limita e depășită.
commit_message: fix: add sliding window rate limiter for relay per pubkey
pr_titlu: fix: implement rate limiting on relay with sliding window counter
pr_body:
## Summary

Implements per-consumer rate limiting on the relay using a sliding window counter mechanism to prevent abuse. Limits requests to 60 per minute per consumer pubkey with configurable threshold via environment variable.

## Changes

- Created `src/relay/rate-limiter.ts` with `SlidingWindowRateLimiter` class implementing in-memory sliding window counter
- Integrated rate limiter middleware in `src/relay/index.ts` to validate requests before processing
- Added `VEIL_RELAY_RATE_LIMIT` configuration in `src/config/index.ts` with default value of 60 and validation
- Modified relay request handler to extract signing pubkey and apply rate limiting
- Returns 429 status with `Retry-After` header when rate limit exceeded
- Added comprehensive test suite in `tests/relay.test.ts` covering:
  - Requests under limit (200 OK)
  - Requests over limit (429 Too Many Requests)
  - Sliding window reset after 1 minute
  - Retry-After header verification

## Testing

- Unit tests verify sub-limit requests return 200 status
- Over-limit requests return 429 with correct Retry-After header
- Window slides correctly after 60 seconds
- Multiple pubkeys tracked independently
- Environment variable configuration validated

Closes #3
